message: The other day, as we braced for a winter storm, our family group chat lit up like a Christmas tree! My sister was sharing her favorite soup recipe, Mom was reminding everyone to check their flashlights, and my brother was sending memes to keep the mood light. 💬 It was a perfect blend of laughter and practical tips, which made the whole thing feel a lot less daunting. It reminded me that even when the weather outside is frightful, staying connected with family makes it all a bit delightful. A little preparation goes a long way, right? What’s your go-to storm comfort food? 🍲
